warm_mannequin.name: Chrome Mannequin
warm_mannequin.short: A chrome mannequin stands in the corner, warm to the touch.
warm_mannequin.examine: Full-figured, mirror-polished, posed mid-invitation. Its surface is body-warm and you can hear something inside it, purring at two hertz.

touch.text: You rest a hand on its shoulder. It shifts — subtly, approvingly — correcting your stance like a patient fencing instructor. You feel deadlier.

kiss.text: Its lips are warm and taste faintly of ozone. Somewhere inside, the purr climbs half an octave. You feel absurdly, unreasonably restored.

dreaming_terminal.name: Dreaming Terminal
dreaming_terminal.short: A terminal murmurs in its sleep, screen glowing through closed shutters.
dreaming_terminal.examine: The terminal is dreaming in schematics. Floor plans drift across the dark glass like fish under ice.

wake.text: You touch the glass. The terminal startles awake and, embarrassed, pours everything it was dreaming straight into your HUD.

outcome.text: The whole floor unfolds across your map.

mirror_pool.name: Mirror Pool
mirror_pool.short: A still pool of something reflective that isn't water.
mirror_pool.examine: Your reflection is a half-beat late, and it watches you with an expression you don't remember making. It looks like it knows something.

touch.text: The surface bites cold up your arm — and for one long second you are on both sides of it, seeing yourself complete. The knowledge stays. The warmth doesn't.

velvet_recliner.name: Velvet Recliner
velvet_recliner.short: A plush recliner sits in impossible good condition, upholstered in red velvet.
velvet_recliner.examine: It is spotless in a way nothing down here should be. The headrest has shaped itself to no head you've ever seen — six indentations, arranged lovingly.

rest.text: The chair remembers every body it has ever held, and it is very, very good at this. You get up twenty minutes later feeling like a new organism.

lipstick_case.name: Abandoned Vanity Case
lipstick_case.short: A vanity case lies open, its mirror cracked into a flattering mosaic.
lipstick_case.examine: Brushes, pigment pots labeled in a dancer's shorthand, and one chrome lipstick — still warm, as if set down a moment ago by someone in a hurry to be beautiful.

take.text: You pocket the chrome lipstick. Somewhere, you feel certain, its owner just smiled.

glitter_moths.name: Glitter Moths
glitter_moths.short: A slow constellation of glittering moths orbits a dead light fixture.
glitter_moths.examine: Each moth is a scrap of foil that decided, at some point, to be alive. They navigate by wealth — you can feel them noticing your credit chit.

offer.text: You hold out your hand. The moths settle along your arm, tasting your warmth, and leave in trade a fine dust of precious metal.

static_kiss.name: Scorched Kiss
static_kiss.short: A perfect lipstick print is scorched into a pane of glass, still crackling faintly.
static_kiss.examine: Someone kissed this glass hard enough to burn. The static around it raises the hair on your arms in a way that feels less like electricity and more like attention.

kiss.text: You press your lips to the print. The shock is immediate, intimate, and entirely worth it — every capacitor you're carrying wakes up singing.

whisper_vent.name: Whispering Vent
whisper_vent.short: A floor vent breathes slow and warm, carrying voices from somewhere deep.
whisper_vent.examine: The voices are conversational, overlapping, unhurried — the Substrate gossiping with itself about everyone who has ever walked its floors.

listen.text: You kneel and listen. Mostly it's gossip — but folded inside is a fighting trick someone died proud of, and now it's yours.
